since_last: 48% of 99 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +0.70%; AI bubble risk 51 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 48% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.81% · BTC +1.90% · Gold -0.46% · Nasdaq100 +1.62%. 48% of 99 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +0.70%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +0.70%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -1.04%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: INTC is the standout at -2.91%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +2.23%, NOW +2.08%, META +2.01%, ORCL +1.47%, NXE +1.37%. Laggards: INTC -2.91%, MU -1.96%, NXPI -1.86%, POWL -1.74%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.34% at $150.12
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.34% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 51 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 51/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
